arts.ttl: Ipswich win should give Brighton belief - Hurzeler
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion head coach Fabian Hurzeler believes his side 'deserved' all three points after securing their first win in eight matches against Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Zlatan Ibrahimovic comments on Kyle Walker move from Manchester City – Insistent AC Milan are doing right thing
arts.sum: Zlatan Ibrahimovic believes AC Milan are getting ‘a great player’ in Kyle Walker, who is set to join from Manchester City. Calciomercato cover comments from the former striker today after he spoke to DAZN before the clash with Juventus. arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Ipswich Town and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Manchester City exit ‘in the home stretch’ – Club now willing to pay for January transfer
arts.sum: Kyle Walker’s move from Manchester City to AC Milan is ‘in the home stretch’ and set to be completed soon. That’s according to Calciomercato, who provide all the details of the full-back’s imminent move to Italy. They report that Walker is ‘getting closer and closer’ to being Milan’s first signing of the January transfer window. arts.ttl: Ipswich 'lost belief' after Brighton took the lead - McKenna
arts.sum: Ipswich boss Kieran McKenna says his side "lacked belief" after falling behind in their 2-0 loss to Brighton at Portman Road.
